title: Senior Investment Banker at IDFC First Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at IDFC First Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IDFC First Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IDFC First Bank:
IDFC First Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDFC First Bank!
